-Wl,-rpath,/app/build/src:/app/build/contrib/libcss:/app/build/contrib/libnsgif:/app/build/contrib/libnsbmp:/app/build/contrib/libsvgtiny:/app/build/contrib/libdom:/app/build/contrib/libhubbub:/app/build/contrib/libparserutils:/app/build/contrib/libnsutils:/app/build/contrib/quickjs-ng:
